encryption_details.key_storage: Obfuscated key bytes stored at _ks (0x4a90e0): c2 cd 95 d6 d1 fa ce 96 dc fa 97 95 97 91. Key recovered by XOR with 0xa5. Parity check on (pid*(pid+1))&1 always yields 0, forcing XOR path. Key length: 14 bytes.

anti_analysis: anti_debug_ptrace: Uses ptrace(PTRACE_TRACEME, 0, 0, 0) to detect debugger attachment
anti_debug_timing: Uses gettimeofday() to measure execution time of a loop (100000 iterations), compares against threshold 0x7a120 (~500ms) to detect step-through debugging
anti_debug_proc: Reads /proc/self/stat and parses TracerPid field to detect tracing
self_modifying_code: _self_modify function at 0x401db0 modifies .text section at runtime using mprotect+memcpy pattern
opaque_predicates: _opaque_true/_opaque_false functions use complex arithmetic that always evaluates to 1 or 0 to confuse static analysis
process_hiding: _hide_proc uses prctl(PR_SET_NAME) via syscall to rename process
junk_code: _ad_ptrace and _ad_timing contain dead/confusing instructions like xchg %bx,%bx and lea (%rsp),%rsp
